# Enkrateia

Official website for Enkrateia, an iOS-first 90-day program to reduce compulsive social media use with phase-gated blocking and daily accountability.

## Canonical URLs
- https://enkrateiaonline.com/
- https://enkrateiaonline.com/privacy.html
- https://enkrateiaonline.com/terms.html

## Contact
- support@enkrateia.app
- privacy@enkrateia.app
